sagemaker.endpointconfig.asyncinferencen: Specifies the configuration for notifications of inference results for asynchronous inference.

sagemaker.endpointconfig.asyncinferencen.Description: Amazon SNS topic to post a notification to when an inference fails. If no topic is provided, no notification is sent on failure.
The Amazon SNS topics where you want the inference response to be included.  The inference response is included only if the response size is less than or equal to 128 KB.
Amazon SNS topic to post a notification to when an inference completes successfully. If no topic is provided, no notification is sent on success.
